summary: Red-team review signal for CPL-03 transcript_artifact + context_bundle eval gate. Eight findings (no S4): six S2/S3 attack vectors and two S0/S1 hygiene items. All S2+ findings closed in-batch via fix actions CPL03-FIX-001..006 with regression tests (TestEvalSummarySchemaAudit, TestGateEvidenceSchemaAudit, TestFailClosedGate, TestPQXIntegration, TestRedTeamRegressions). This is a non-authority review signal; canonical control ownership remains with the appropriate canonical owner.

findings.description: Forged gate_evidence with a hand-crafted eval_summary_id could pass schema validation and surface a passed_gate state without a corresponding eval_summary artifact.
findings.recommendation: Run the eval_summary and gate_evidence registrations as two PQX steps; the second step re-derives the eval_summary_id from the same deterministic inputs and halts if the value drifts from the registered eval_summary id (EVAL_SUMMARY_ID_DRIFT).

findings.description: Replay mismatch: a tampered context_bundle with a forged manifest_hash could pass referential checks but break replay equivalence.
findings.recommendation: Re-derive manifest_hash from segments using the same canonicalisation as context_bundle_assembler._compute_manifest_hash; raise REPLAY_MANIFEST_HASH_MISMATCH on drift; surface in failed_gate.

findings.description: Partial transcript coverage (segments < turns or segments > turns) could produce a gate_evidence that hides silent truncation or duplication.
findings.recommendation: Reject COVERAGE_COUNT_MISMATCH in the coverage eval whenever len(segments) != len(speaker_turns); surface failed_gate.

findings.description: PQX bypass: a caller could construct an eval_summary or gate_evidence by hand and pass it to ArtifactStore.register_artifact, skipping run_pqx_step and bypassing trace propagation and the pqx_execution_record.
findings.recommendation: Pure evaluator returns payloads WITHOUT content_hash so the artifact store rejects direct registration. Test test_evaluator_cannot_register_directly_without_pqx locks this contract; the run_eval_gate_via_pqx wrapper is the only sanctioned write path.

findings.description: Missing eval_summary_id in gate_evidence could be admitted if the schema did not require it; downstream consumers would lose the back-reference to the eval evidence.
findings.recommendation: Mark eval_summary_id as required in the gate_evidence schema and constrain its pattern to ^EVS-[A-Z0-9_-]+$. Reject admission via additionalProperties: false.

findings.description: Forged segments with source_turn_id values that do not exist in transcript.speaker_turns could pass schema validation but break lineage.
findings.recommendation: Reject ORPHAN_SEGMENT and SEGMENT_TURN_DRIFT in the referential_integrity eval; surface failed_gate.

findings.description: Indeterminate per-eval status (e.g., a status string outside {pass, fail}) could produce a gate_evidence without a clear status.
findings.recommendation: Constrain eval_result.status to enum [pass, fail]; reject all other values at schema validation; gate_status maps indeterminate aggregations to conditional_gate (NOT routable).

findings.description: Module docstring did not state that the gate produces evidence only and that canonical routing remains with the appropriate canonical owner; risk of misreading the artifact as a routing signal.
findings.recommendation: Module docstring states evidence-only role and references the non-authority guidance from contracts/governance/authority_neutral_vocabulary.json; gate_evidence schema description repeats the boundary statement.
